_comment: 0.7.64 — re-parented from defeat_elite_four (deleted in this release as a duplicate) back to beat_gym_23. The consecutive-E4 requirement is now enforced at runtime by cobblemon-bridge's E4GauntletHook (dimension leash + party stability, added in 0.7.63), not via advancement requirements, so beat_gym_23 being parent is enough — the player can only complete it by beating Lance after Lorelei/Cynthia/Agatha in sequence.

description.text: Defeat the Champion and claim the title.
